allow: Bash(echo "=== 构建产物 ===" && ls -la build_version/easychat_extension_2.0.0/ && echo "" && echo "=== src 目录结构 ===" && find src -type f | sort && echo "" && echo "=== 文件行数统计 ===" && wc -l src/*.ts src/*.tsx src/*.css src/**/*.ts 2>/dev/null | sort -n)

Bash(TASK_DIR=".trellis/tasks/02-25-mcp-tool-architecture" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/functions/types.ts" "现有工具函数类型定义，MCP 类型需与之映射" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/functions/registry.ts" "当前工具注册表，需重构为 MCP Server" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "编排器核心，需改用 MCP Client 调用工具" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/types.ts" "AI 类型定义，需了解 ToolSchema 等类型" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/background.ts" "后台脚本，MCP 初始化入口" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/functions/types.ts" "验证类型兼容性" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "验证编排器重构正确性" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/ai/types.ts" "验证类型一致性")

Bash(TASK_DIR=".trellis/tasks/02-26-agentic-loop" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "核心重构目标文件" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/types.ts" "类型扩展" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/llm-client.ts" "AbortSignal支持" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/background.ts" "取消机制" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/content/float-ball.ts" "UI增强" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "核心验证" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/ai/types.ts" "类型验证" && ./.trellis/scripts/task.sh start "$TASK_DIR")

Bash(TASK=".trellis/tasks/02-26-session-state-centralization" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK" implement ".trellis/spec/frontend/state-management.md" "会话状态管理策略" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK" implement ".trellis/spec/guides/cross-layer-thinking-guide.md" "跨层数据流设计指导" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK" check ".trellis/spec/frontend/state-management.md" "验证状态管理模式" && \\
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK" check ".trellis/spec/guides/cross-layer-thinking-guide.md" "验证跨层通信设计")

Bash(tree /Users/clark/MySpace/chrome-extension/docs -L 3 --charset ascii 2>/dev/null || find /Users/clark/MySpace/chrome-extension/docs -type f -name "*.md" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.css" | grep -v cache | grep -v dist | sort)
Bash(export https_proxy="http://127.0.0.1:7897" && git push origin main)
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:clark-maybe/mole-extension.git && git push origin main)
Bash(npm view antd versions --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('5.'\)]; print\(versions[-1] if versions else 'none'\)")

Bash(npm view antd versions --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('5.'\) and '-' not in v]; print\(versions[-1] if versions else 'none'\)")

Bash(npm view @ant-design/icons versions --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('5.'\) and '-' not in v]; print\(versions[-1] if versions else 'none'\)")

Bash(for dir in .trellis/tasks/03-*/; do echo "=== $\(basename $dir\) ==="; cat "$dir/task.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"标题: {d.get\('title','?'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"优先级: {d.get\('priority','?'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"状态: {d.get\('status','?'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"负责人: {d.get\('assignee','?'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"描述: {d.get\('description','?'\)}\\"\)"; echo; done)

  CLAUDE.md \\
  docs/guide/features.md \\
  src/ai/system-prompt.ts \\

Bash(for f in src/functions/cdp-console.ts src/functions/cdp-css.ts src/functions/cdp-dialog.ts src/functions/cdp-dom.ts src/functions/cdp-emulation.ts src/functions/cdp-fetch.ts src/functions/cdp-frame.ts src/functions/cdp-input.ts src/functions/cdp-network.ts src/functions/cdp-overlay.ts src/functions/cdp-storage.ts src/functions/dom-manipulate.ts src/functions/extract-data.ts src/functions/page-action.ts src/functions/page-skeleton.ts src/functions/page-snapshot.ts src/functions/page-viewer.ts src/functions/screenshot.ts src/functions/site-experience.ts; do sed -i '' "s/typeof context?.tabId === 'number'/typeof context?.tabId === 'number' \\&\\& context.tabId > 0/g" "$f"; done && echo "done")

Bash(for f in src/functions/screenshot.ts src/functions/page-viewer.ts src/functions/page-snapshot.ts src/functions/page-skeleton.ts src/functions/page-action.ts src/functions/extract-data.ts src/functions/dom-manipulate.ts src/functions/cdp-storage.ts src/functions/cdp-overlay.ts src/functions/cdp-network.ts src/functions/cdp-input.ts src/functions/cdp-frame.ts src/functions/cdp-fetch.ts src/functions/cdp-emulation.ts src/functions/cdp-dom.ts src/functions/cdp-dialog.ts src/functions/cdp-css.ts src/functions/cdp-console.ts; do sed -i '' "s/typeof tab_id === 'number' && Number.isFinite\(tab_id\)/typeof tab_id === 'number' \\&\\& tab_id > 0/g" "$f"; done && echo "done")
Bash(gh release list --limit 5 2>/dev/null || echo "No releases found or gh not configured")
Bash(gh repo view --json name,url,isPrivate 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not get repo info")

Bash(TASK_DIR=".trellis/tasks/03-26-visual-grounding"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/content/page-grounding.ts" "标注元素收集、DOM标记注入/移除"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/functions/screenshot.ts" "screenshot工具增强annotate参数"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "截图注入增强、映射表注入"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" implement "src/ai/system-prompt.ts" "Look→Act→Check协议引导"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/content/page-grounding.ts" "验证标注逻辑"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/functions/screenshot.ts" "验证screenshot增强"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh add-context "$TASK_DIR" check "src/ai/orchestrator.ts" "验证注入逻辑"
./.trellis/scripts/task.sh start "$TASK_DIR")
